---
title: "MotoGP Dissertation"
author: "Camilla Piccione"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(hyper2)
library("magrittr")
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

## MotoGP



```{r cars}
MotoGP2025_Race <- read.delim("C:/Users/User/Desktop/Tesi master/MototGP/Data txt/MotoGP2025_Race.txt")

MotoGP2025_Sprint <- read.delim("C:/Users/User/Desktop/Tesi master/MototGP/Data txt/MotoGP2025_Sprint.txt")


MotoGP2024_Race <- read.delim("C:/Users/User/Desktop/Tesi master/MototGP/Data txt/MotoGP2024_Race.txt")

MotoGP2024_Sprint <- read.delim("C:/Users/User/Desktop/Tesi master/MototGP/Data txt/MotoGP2024_Sprint.txt")
```



```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
head(MotoGP2025_Sprint)

top5_sprint <- MotoGP2025_Sprint %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = S.THA:S.VAL,
    names_to = "Sprint_Race",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Sprint_Race = factor(Sprint_Race, levels = names(MotoGP2025_Sprint)[5:26])
  )

ggplot(top5_sprint, aes(x = Sprint_Race, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Sprint Race Performance 2025",
    x = "Sprint Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```

```{r cars1}
head(MotoGP2025_Race)
top5_race <- MotoGP2025_Race %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = THA:VAL,
    names_to = "Race",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Race = factor(Race, levels = names(MotoGP2025_Race)[5:26])
  )

ggplot(top5_race, aes(x = Race, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Race Performance 2025",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```
## MotoGP 2024

```{r cars2}
head(MotoGP2024_Sprint)

top5_sprint24 <- MotoGP2024_Sprint %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = S.QAT:S.SLD,
    names_to = "Sprint_Race24",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Sprint_Race24 = factor(Sprint_Race24, levels = names(MotoGP2024_Sprint)[5:24])
  )

ggplot(top5_sprint24, aes(x = Sprint_Race24, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Sprint Race Performance 2024",
    x = "Sprint Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r cars3}
head(MotoGP2024_Race)

top5_race24 <- MotoGP2024_Race %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = QAT:SLD,
    names_to = "Race",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Race = factor(Race, levels = names(MotoGP2024_Race)[5:24])
  )

ggplot(top5_race24, aes(x = Race, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Race Performance 2024",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))



```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
